channel.title: Health News, Wellbeing Tips, Diseases, Treatment and Nutrition | The Hindu
channel.description: News and information on medical treatment, diets, cancer, lifestyle diseases, communicable diseases, hospitals, organ donation, blood donation, AIDS, old age, mental health

image.title: Health News, Wellbeing Tips, Diseases, Treatment and Nutrition | The Hindu

item.title: Heatwave plays havoc, exposes Telangana’s fragile health and social systems
President Droupadi Murmu confers Padma Vibhushan on Nageshwar Reddy
item.description: Dr.Reddy, who serves as the chairman of the Asian Institute of Gastroenterology (AIG) in Hyderabad, is among seven persons to receive the Padma Vibhushan this year

item.title: All you need to know about: shingles
item.description: Typically, people over the age of 50, pregnant women, newborns, older persons and those with compromised immune systems are at risk of contracting shingles

channel.item: Indian scientists help develop Brain-Computer Interface that enables movement for people who are paralysedThe participant, after training with a virtual robotic arm, was able to control a real-world robotic arm to perform tasks like picking up blocks, opening a cabinet, and even holding a cup under a water dispenser, demonstrating the potential of BCIs to enable life-changing tasks for individuals with paralysishttps://www.thehindu.com/sci-tech/health/brain-computer-interface-enables-movement-for-people-who-are-paralysed/article69501067.ece<guid isPe
